latin: Magister Iaponicus discipulum vehicula lavare iussit. 'ceram impone, ceram remove,' iterum atque iterum dicebat. discipulus nesciebat se artem pugnandi discere.

questions.prompt: What did the master order the student to do?
questions.target: Wash cars while applying and removing wax
choices: Wash cars while applying and removing wax

questions.prompt: What was the student actually learning?

translation: A Japanese master ordered his student to wash cars. 'Wax on, wax off,' he kept saying again and again. The student did not know he was learning the art of fighting.
